texto: Humans are aware of very little, it seems to me, the artificial brainy side of life, the worries and bills and the mechanisms of jobs, the doltish psychologies we've placed over our lives like a stencil. A dog keeps his life simple and unadorned.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brad Watson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Humans are aware of very little, it seems to me, the artificial brainy side of life, the worries …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, dogs, mississippi pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e mississippi.
